CM-A_driving_port.rationale: Tests invoke through reverse-proxy HTTP only. No test imports production internals (DD-3).

CM-B_business_language.expected: no matches inside Gherkin Scenario/Given/When/Then lines
CM-B_business_language.rationale: Technical terms live in driver.py and step methods only.

CM-C_walking_skeletons_and_focused.rationale: One walking-skeleton scenario proves the seam end-to-end through reverse-proxy; the remaining 64 are focused boundary tests per story.

pure_functions.name: resolveActiveScope
pure_functions.location: ui-state/lib/active-scope.ts (REUSED from J-001 — no changes by J-002 per DESIGN Reuse Analysis)

CM-D_pure_function_extraction.rationale: Each pure function is unit-tested with zero fixture cost in DELIVER's inner loop. Only the thin adapter layer is parametrized by env.

praxis_review_resolutions.F-2_deprecation_window_mechanics: Addressed inline by DESIGN (review §7 ✅). MR-4 lands the compile-time sunset check per DWD-3.
praxis_review_resolutions.F-3_loader_fanout_coordination: Addressed inline by DESIGN (review §7 ✅). DISTILL flags as O7 in upstream-issues.md; DELIVER coordinates with slate crew before MR-1.
praxis_review_resolutions.F-4_stale_intent_filter_concurrent_datas: DISTILL-resolved per DD-4. Encoded as test_us210::test_praxis_f4_* + Gherkin SSOT @praxis_f4 in features/us-210-freeze-thaw-replay.feature. Un-skips at MR-6.
praxis_review_resolutions.F-5_org_id_inheritance_window: DISTILL-resolved per DD-5. Encoded as test_journey_invariants::test_ic_j002_1_* (@praxis_f5) + Gherkin SSOT @praxis_f5 in features/journey-invariants-j002.feature. Un-skips at MR-1.
